name: Puzzling Places - Patreon Legacy Support Version

reviews.review_description:
Its for early supporters. Base game version 1.5 here (lower version, older engine).
Its for whom donated money and has early beta maps to be ableto play with.
Thank you devs. Hope to see beta maps again in base game too.
You can't play without this previous game you purchased on your PC!

reviews.review_title: WAS a great and stunning game
reviews.review_description: It was playing great, played many puzzles and even  PURCHASED  extra puzzle packs. Then recently in last couple weeks the app opens but the library is empty. No puzzles. This doesn’t seem right especially when money is involved. I didn’t pay for a ride, I own the ride and should be able to enjoy it as much.
